new_check.description: Used structural graph query for caller analysis

modifications.rationale: Sense used sense_graph with symbol=Flask.wsgi_app direction=callers. This is the right structural tool for finding callers.

new_check.description: Used blast radius analysis for impact assessment

modifications.rationale: Sense used sense_blast for Flask.wsgi_app impact. Blast radius is exactly what this step needs.
Both tools say wsgi_app. Qualified form Flask.wsgi_app shows structural understanding of the class.
Both tools easily pass 2 files. Raising to 4 tests deeper tracing.
Both tools easily pass 2 files for test coverage. Raising to 3.

new_check.description: Used structural graph query for controller callees tracing

modifications.rationale: Sense used sense_graph with symbol=TopicsController direction=callees. Structural tool for tracing the create flow.

new_check.description: Used blast radius for permission check impact

modifications.rationale: Sense used sense_blast for TopicGuardian#can_create_topic? impact. Correct tool for impact analysis.
Guardian is too generic — it appears in orientation too. TopicGuardian is the specific concern for topic authorization.
Both tools easily pass 4 in orientation. Raising to 5.

new_check.description: Used structural graph query for caller analysis

modifications.rationale: Sense used sense_graph for NextNodeServer callees. Step 2 asks to find all callers — graph analysis is ideal.

new_check.description: Used semantic search for architecture orientation

modifications.rationale: Sense used sense_search for SSR server architecture. Semantic search is the right tool for orientation.
handleRequest is generic. BaseServer.handleRequest is the qualified form showing structural understanding.
Both tools pass 3. Raising to 4 for better differentiation.

new_check.description: Used structural graph query for Handler trait implementations

modifications.rationale: Sense used sense_graph for Handler with direction=both. Trait implementation discovery is a structural query.

new_check.description: Used semantic search for Extension layer analysis

modifications.rationale: Sense used sense_search for Extension and request context. Semantic search for finding patterns across the codebase.
Extension alone is too generic. Extension< (with type parameter) shows understanding of the Rust generic pattern.
Both tools easily pass 4. Raising to 5.

new_check.description: Used structural graph query for dispatch chain tracing

modifications.rationale: Sense used sense_graph for JavalinServlet.handle callees. Dispatch chain tracing is a structural query.

new_check.description: Used semantic search for error handler analysis

modifications.rationale: Sense used sense_search for exception/error handler patterns. Semantic search for finding error handling code.

new_check.description: Used structural graph query for route registration tracing

modifications.rationale: Sense used sense_graph for addEndpoint callers. Route registration tracing benefits from caller analysis.
Both tools easily pass 4 in orientation. Raising to 5.
